data.body: SUPERSEDED-DESIGN: delivered HLC-epoch key validity diverges from the approved git-commit-ancestry model. Reworked by transition story TS2 09f9-f66c-9748-48e5 (halfcrazed-sylphlike-salmon). Security rationale: HLC ordering is partly author-assigned (backdatable); the commit DAG is immutable. See session_log d7c0.
